title: Seal
doc_html:
§303.  Seal

The state treasurer shall keep a seal of office, which shall be used to authenticate all written papers, documents, and certificates from his office.

Acts 1976, No. 428, §1, eff. July 31, 1976.
doc_text:
§303.  Seal
The state treasurer shall keep a seal of office, which shall be used to authenticate all written papers, documents, and certificates from his office.
Acts 1976, No. 428, §1, eff. July 31, 1976.
